Characteristics of Pimples LII 447
The metre is stort.]
nH^rq^T
Pimples on the nose and temples bestow clothes and children
respectively ; on the lips, good food ; on the lower part of the chin,
the same thing i.e. food ; on the forehead, plenty of money; on the
two sides of the jaw-bone, the same result i.e. much wealth ; on the
neck, ornaments, good food and drinks ; on the ears, a number of
ear-ornaments as well as spiritual knowledge.
[Gf qwc—
The metre is q^PPRTC.]

Pimples on the joint of the head cause a hurt from an iron
instrument , on the neck, blows ; on the heart and breasts, birth of
son ; on the sides, grief; on the chest, attainment of desired objects;
on the shoulders, frequent roamings for begging alms ; and in the
